creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm starting to suspect (without any hard evidence yet) that this is
something that has actually changed in libthr or similar, rather than in
the port (although the port may be tickling this bug in an unusual way).

As a datapoint, apparently Freeradius didn't have this problem on a 6.1
machine.  Does anybody know whether 7.x or 8.0 suffered at all?

Gavin

--=20
Gavin Atkinson
FreeBSD committer and bugmeister
GPG: A093262B (313A A79F 697D 3A5C 216A  EDF5 935D EF44 A093 262B)
